name: libclone-perl
title: libclone-perl
summary: module for recursively copying Perl datatypes
description:
module for recursively copying Perl datatypes
The Clone module provides a clone() method which makes recursive copies of
nested hash, array, scalar and reference types, including tied variables and
objects.
.
It is faster (although less flexible) than Storable's dclone. Its
functionality is _not_ serializing in-memory objects (i.e. as
Data::Dumper or YAML::Dump do), but deep-copying them over to new
in-memory structures.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libclone-perl because module for recursively copying Perl datatypes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libclone-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libclone-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libclone-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
